problem id: 9f2e45e7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01100010 -> 10001100
  00001111 -> 11000001
  00110111 -> 11000110
  11110110 -> 10011110
  01110000 -> 00001110
  11110101 -> 01011110
  10000111 -> 11010000
  01010011 -> 11001010
  01100110 -> 10001100
  00111111 -> 11000111

query: 10010111
predicted answer: 11010010
